name: Amazing Energy Oil and Gas, Co.
summary: Amazing Energy Oil and Gas, Co., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas in the United States. As of July 31, 2019, the company had leasehold rights to approximately 70,000 acres in Pecos County, Texas, and 5,385 acres in Lea County, New Mexico with estimated net proved reserves of 499,666 barrels of oil equivalent. It also owned 26 oil and gas wells in the Permian Basin and 7 oil wells in Lea County, New Mexico. In addition, the company provides oilfield services to oil and gas well owners. Amazing Energy Oil and Gas, Co. is based in Fort Worth, Texas.
